case_title: WAN PANG HA YEUNG RESPONDENT VS. JIN XI SERVICE CO. APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT JIN XI SERVICE CO. AS TO RESPONDENT YEUNG, WAN PANG HA HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINUTES FOR DEC-04-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT YEUNG, WAN PANG HA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT JIN XI SERVICE CO. $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,650.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

TRIAL DE NOVO HELD WED., 04DEC2002; COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF MS. WAN PANG HA YEUNG AND AGAINST DEFENDANT MR. XI WEI DENG DBA JIN XI SERVICE COMPANY FOR $3,600.00, NO ATTORNEYS FEES, AND $50.00 IN COSTS; ALL PRESENTED EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES BY THE COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID HICKS; CSR: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED
